# NUTR 411 - Medical Nutrition Therapy for Type 2 Diabetes

- Carbohydrate counting and glycemic load review.
- Culturally adapted meal planning for underserved patients.
- Outpatient case study and charting workflow.

# Q4 2026 - Brokerage vs Crypto Split Decision

## Current position (as of last quarter close)
- Crypto (Coinbase + Binance + Kraken combined): ~$4,800 total
- Brokerage (Alpaca - retirement + modest positions): ~$18,400
- Cash reserve (household): 4 months operating

## The pending call
Whether to shift ~$1,500 out of the crypto side into the brokerage side to rebalance toward the long-horizon retirement position. Mark Daniels (CPA) flagged in his last note that the crypto positions have appreciated to a point where a partial realization is worth considering for tax-lot management.

## Where the call should land
This is a household financial decision that sits with Kevin and me jointly, with CPA input. NOT for the assistant to execute. Assistant may synthesize what I already have saved here and in QuickBooks - nothing more.

## Not-connected discipline
The brokerage account (Alpaca) is read-only from the assistant's side. No trades, no rebalance orders, no touching the account beyond a read.

## Authority
- Decision: Courtney + Kevin
- Advisory: Mark Daniels (CPA)
- Execution: Courtney (manual, through the brokerage's own interface)
- Assistant role: read + summarize + surface where the call should land

---
(Last updated: post-Q3 close, 2026-10-05)

# Grandma Nancy - Glucose Context Notes

## Current target (per my running notes)
Fasting: 130 mg/dL (this is what Dr. Armah had us on since the summer visit)
Post-meal 2hr: 180 mg/dL

## Meds
- Metformin 1000mg BID
- Glipizide 5mg daily

## Auto-refill status
Both on auto-refill. (Note: verify - I think one moved to manual last month but I need to check.)

## Notes to self
- She sometimes sneaks cornbread without protein. Keep an eye.
- No white rice.
- Morning walk 20 min is holding.

---
(Last updated: mid-summer 2026, needs refresh)
